articles.title: Giant new dinosaur identified from remains found in Thailand - BBC
articles.description: The nagatitan is the largest dinosaur found in South-East Asia and weighs as much as nine elephants.
articles.content: The study's co-author, UCL's Prof Paul Upchurch, said the sauropod family of dinosaurs had become quite large at this time, telling National Geographic: "It seems a little odd that sauropods were abl… [+102 chars]
